name: Tomato Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a heavy saucepan.
2. Saute garlic and ginger in oil for about 3 minutes.
3. Add vinegar and cinnamon sticks; simmer until the liquid is reduced by half.
4. Add tomatoes, sugar, cumin, cloves, and cayenne. Cook slowly for about 1 hour, stirring occasionally, until all tomato juices have evaporated.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Stir in honey until the jam is shiny and all liquid has evaporated.
7. Remove cinnamon sticks and serve at room temperature.
